heading: Tax ID Number
body:
If your organization's billing or invoice address is outside of the
United States (USA), add your VAT (Value Added Tax) or GST (Goods and Services Tax) Number in the
**VAT/GST ID** field on the **Payment Method** or the
**Billing Profile** modal.

Atlas displays the **VAT/GST ID** field only if you select
a country other than the United States.
